batches.qc_description: Moisture content out of specification: 5.8% against limit of NMT 4.0%. Humidity excursion during processing suspected. Severity: Minor. Observation: atypical odor detected during granulation on Suite 4. Action: QA initiated investigation. Ref: DEV-2679. Sample: SMP-98696 (blend sample) at Stability Lab. Batch size: 200kg. Operator: OP-74.

All critical quality attributes within specification. Visual inspection clear. Assay 99.2%. Dissolution 96% at 30min. Disposition: Released after review. QA review complete. Ref: DEV-3615. Sample: SMP-65392 (bulk API sample) at Micro Lab. Batch size: 100kg. Operator: OP-58.
